message:
fix(tools): CRLF idempotency bug, redundant counter, div-by-zero guard, kill() clarity

- build_normalized_content/map_normalized_range_to_original: use
  trim_end_matches('\r') instead of strip_suffix('\r') so that \r\r\n
  sequences normalize idempotently (fixes proptest failure)
- truncate_head: remove redundant `i` counter that duplicated `line_count`
- GrepTool: remove unnecessary `let _ =` from kill() call that already
  propagates errors via `?`

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
